title: I Declare! You Declare? We Declare, 1776-2026
shortDescription: Directed by Dr. Melinda Wilson Ramsey (Theater and Dance, California State University, Sacramento)
longDescription: Student performance of a series of speeches, poems and letters throughout American history that celebrate and question the Declaration of Independence.

title: “Another Tribe” – Revolutionary Women in Revolutionary Times
shortDescription: Chair. Mrs. Donnamaria Bly (History, Old Dominion University)
longDescription: A pictorial examination of women and their role in the Age of Revolution

title: Peter H. Shattuck Rare Books Collection Exhibit
location: Donald & Beverly Gerth Special Collections & University Archives
shortDescription: Curator. Ms. Sarah Allison, Head of Donald & Beverly Gerth Special Collections & University Archives.
longDescription: A display of the Peter H. Shattuck Library.

title: Opening Remarks

title: Public Reading of the Declaration of Independence.
longDescription: A group of Sac State students publishing Mr. Jefferson’s hallowed parchment.

"The Emergence of Colonial Unity: The Stamp Act Congress and the Formation of American Political capacity"
